title: Validate and cache tree-walks are duplicated without comment
description: lib.rs: validate_stmt and collect_regex_patterns implement nearly identical recursive tree-walks (both scan forms for Tag(regex)/Tag(matches), handle Block clause boundaries, recurse into TestList). No comment explains why they are separate functions or what coupling exists between them. A contributor who refactors one is likely to break the other silently. Add a comment above each function naming the parallel and explaining why unification was not done (or unify them).
